function.name: get_addresses
function.description: Swiggy (Instamart/Food): Get all saved delivery addresses for the authenticated Swiggy user, sorted by last order date.

function.name: create_address
function.description:
Swiggy (Instamart/Food): Create a new delivery address for the authenticated user.

📍 WORKFLOW - What to ASK the user:

fullAddress.description: Complete address as provided by the user

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the address (REQUIRED) (numeric value)

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the address (REQUIRED) (numeric value)

addressCategory.description: Type of address: HOME, WORK, OFFICE, FRIENDS_AND_FAMILY, or OTHER (REQUIRED)

receiverName.description: Receiver name if delivering to someone else (optional)

receiverPhone.description: Receiver phone if delivering to someone else (optional)

function.name: delete_address
function.description:
Swiggy (Instamart/Food): Delete a saved delivery address for the authenticated user.

📍 WORKFLOW:
1. First call get_add

addressId.description: The ID of the address to delete (from get_addresses response)

function.name: search_restaurants
function.description: Search and order food from restaurants for delivery. PRIMARY FOOD DELIVERY SERVICE - Use this when user wants to order f

offset.description: Pagination offset. Use nextOffset from previous re (numeric value)

function.name: search_menu
function.description: Search for dishes and menu items to order for food delivery. PRIMARY FOOD DELIVERY SERVICE - Use this when user wants to

restaurantIdOfAddedItem.description: Optional restaurant ID to scope search

vegFilter.description: Veg filter flag (0 or 1). Pass 1 for veg-only item (numeric value)

offset.description: Pagination offset. Use nextOffset from previous re (numeric value)

function.name: get_restaurant_menu
function.description: Get the complete menu of a restaurant, paginated by category. Use this to BROWSE a restaurant menu and see what is avail

restaurantId.description: Restaurant ID to fetch menu for (from search_restaurants)

pageSize.description: Number of categories per page (default: 5, max: 8) (numeric value)

function.name: get_food_cart
function.description: Get current food delivery cart with all items. PRIMARY FOOD DELIVERY SERVICE - Use this to view cart contents when order

addressId.description: Address ID to get accurate delivery charges based on location.

function.name: update_food_cart
function.description: Add items to food delivery cart or update cart contents. PRIMARY FOOD DELIVERY SERVICE - Use this when user wants to add

cartItems.description: Array of items to add to cart with their customizations

addressId.description: Address ID to get accurate delivery charges based on location.

function.name: flush_food_cart
function.description: Clear or empty the food delivery cart. PRIMARY FOOD DELIVERY SERVICE - Use this to remove all items from the food delive

function.name: place_food_order
function.description: Place food delivery order and confirm order placement. PRIMARY FOOD DELIVERY SERVICE - Use this when user wants to place

function.name: fetch_food_coupons
function.description: Get available coupons and offers for food delivery order. PRIMARY FOOD DELIVERY SERVICE - Use this to find discounts, co

couponCode.description: Optional coupon code to check applicability of a specific coupon

function.name: apply_food_coupon
function.description: Apply coupon code or discount to food delivery order. PRIMARY FOOD DELIVERY SERVICE - Use this when user wants to apply

function.name: get_food_orders
function.description: Get active food delivery orders and order status. PRIMARY FOOD DELIVERY SERVICE - Use this when user asks about their or

orderCount.description: Number of orders to fetch (default: 5, max: 20) (numeric value)

addressId.description: Address ID to use for fetching orders (can be obtained from get_addresses)

function.name: get_food_order_details
function.description: Get detailed information about a specific food delivery order. PRIMARY FOOD DELIVERY SERVICE - Use this when user asks a

orderId.description: Order ID to fetch details for (can be obtained from get_food_orders)

function.name: track_food_order
function.description: Track food delivery order status and delivery progress. PRIMARY FOOD DELIVERY SERVICE - Use this when user asks to track

function.name: report_error
function.description: Generate an error report to share with the Swiggy MCP team. Use this when the user encounters an error and wants to repo

errorMessage.description: The error message the user saw

userNotes.description: Any additional notes or context the user wants to share

function.name: get_saved_locations
function.description: Swiggy Dineout (Reservations): Get user's saved addresses for restaurant search. NOT for food delivery or grocery orders

cartType.description: Cart type: DEAL_TICKET_PURCHASE for booking, DINEOUT for bill payment

slotId.description: Slot ID (required for booking cart) (numeric value)

itemId.description: Item ID (required for booking cart, format: "restaurantId-ticketId")

reservationTime.description: Unix timestamp (required for booking cart) (numeric value)

guestCount.description: Number of guests (required for booking cart, 1-20) (numeric value)

billAmount.description: Bill amount in rupees (required for bill payment c (numeric value)
